---
title: "Contact Us"
description: |
  Get in touch with the engineering and management team at Elachy Systems.
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

<style>
/* Native styling matching your clean HTML form concept */
.custom-contact-form p {
  margin-bottom: 5px;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #333;
  margin-top: 10px;
}
.custom-contact-form input[type='text'],
.custom-contact-form input[type='email'],
.custom-contact-form input[type='tel'],
.custom-contact-form textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: inherit;
}
.custom-contact-form input[type='submit'] {
  background-color: #e60000; /* Clean accent red */
  color: white;
  padding: 12px 20px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 4px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: bold;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 1rem;
  margin-top: 15px;
}
.custom-contact-form input[type='submit']:hover {
  background-color: #cc0000;
}
</style>

::: {.l-page}
:::: {.d-grid style="grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr; grid-gap: 60px;"}

::: {.custom-contact-form}
### Leave us a Message

<form method="POST" action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORMSPREEE_ID">
  
  <p>FIRST NAME</p>
  <input type="text" name="first_name" required />
  
  <p>LAST NAME</p>
  <input type="text" name="last_name" required />

  <p>EMAIL ADDRESS</p>
  <input type="email" name="email" required />

  <p>PHONE NUMBER</p>
  <input type="tel" name="phone" />

  <p>MESSAGE</p>
  <textarea name="message" rows="6" required></textarea>

  <input type="submit" value="SUBMIT" />
</form>
:::

::: {}
### Direct Inquiries

We welcome project inquiries, corporate consultations, and partnership discussions. Reach out to our technical team directly via email or phone, and we will get back to you within 24 hours.

<br>

* **General Engineering Inquiries:** [sales@elasystems.com](mailto:sales@elasystems.com)
* **Direct Mobile/WhatsApp:** +254 701 108204

<br>

### Head Office Address

* **Elachy Systems Limited**
* Amani House, Magadi Road
* Nairobi, Kenya
 **Tel:** +254 701 108204
 **Email:** sales@elasystems.com
 **Web:** [www.elachysystems.com](https://www.elachysystems.com)
:::

::::
:::
